scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) if [ "$CI" = "true" ]; then echo "Non-pnpm install detected in CI; continuing for deployment compatibility." >&2; else echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1; fi ;; esac'
scripts.dev: pnpm exec concurrently -k -n api,web,tunnel -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "pnpm --filter @workspace/app run dev" "node scripts/dev-tunnel.mjs"
scripts.dev:no-tunnel: pnpm exec concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "pnpm --filter @workspace/app run dev"
scripts.dev:full: pnpm run db:sync-neon-local && pnpm exec concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "pnpm --filter @workspace/app run dev"
scripts.dev:full:tunnel: pnpm run db:sync-neon-local && pnpm run dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @workspace/app run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
